# GitHub Repository Configuration

This directory contains repository-level automation and collaboration files.

## Taxonomy

- `workflows/` — continuous-integration and automation workflows.
- `ISSUE_TEMPLATE/` — issue-reporting templates.
- `PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md` — pull-request checklist.

## Current status

- ❌ CI workflow not implemented yet.
- ❌ Automated Android build not implemented yet.
- ❌ Automated backend tests on push not implemented yet.
